summary: Stage 6 Codex Exec backend design contract completed before implementation.

tests_run.summary: 235 tests passed with the cache provider disabled.

Full verification passed after adding the file-purpose entry, including ruff, format check, mypy, CLI smoke checks, file justification, public hygiene, planning integrity, skill inventory, source inventory, protected locks, and uv lock check.

Backend boundary and command contract ar.evidence: ARCHITECTURE.md now defines WorkerBackend and CodexExecBackend responsibilities. CONTRACTS.md now defines the Codex Exec Backend Contract, preflight metadata, argv command shape, and failure classes. No backend implementation files were changed.

First vertical slice has clear allowed p.evidence: ROADMAP.md now names Stage 6A, its allowed implementation paths, verification commands, and rollback behavior. plans/planning.sqlite3 contains task-stage6a-backend-protocol-fake-execution blocked by this completed design task, and the durable result artifact has a file-purpose manifest entry.

risks: The local WindowsApps Codex executable could not run codex --version in this shell, so the future backend must preserve codex_cli_unavailable as a first-class preflight failure.
Stage 6A is intentionally non-live and does not prove real codex exec process launch.
handoff_notes: Next ready work should be Stage 6A: implement the backend protocol, fake backend, and shared result-ingestion path without launching live Codex.
